overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a character walking through a long, sunlit stone corridor in an ancient Egyptian temple. The character, dressed in traditional linen garments, moves steadily forward as sunlight streams through arched openings on the right, illuminating the sandy-colored stone walls and decorative ceiling.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient Egyptian temple corridor with rhythmic arched openings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the stone corridor following a distant robed figure ahead

notable_agents.action: distant figure in white robes walking ahead in the corridor, gradually moving further away

entered.detail: long corridor with sandstone block walls and red painted vertical accents
large dark wooden panel door with metal fixtures set in the left wall
series of tall arched doorways on the right wall opening to bright exterior
ornate ceiling with geometric patterns and faded paint in earth tones
massive sandstone pillar framing the arched openings

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a long, covered stone corridor of an ancient Egyptian temple. Sunlight streams through arched openings on the right, casting dramatic shadows across the sandy floor. The camera follows a character in traditional white linen attire walking forward, pursuing a distant figure ahead. The walls feature weathered red paint accents and heavy wooden doors, while the ceiling displays faded decorative patterns.

scene_state.functional_zone: continuing temple corridor with passing pedestrians

events.description: character passes an NPC carrying a basket who enters from the right archway

agents.ego_description: continuing down the corridor, passing other pedestrians and maintaining a steady pace

notable_agents.action: NPC carrying a yellow basket entering the corridor from an arched doorway on the right, then walking ahead

segments.scene_description: The walk continues through the temple corridor as the character moves past other pedestrians. An NPC carrying a basket enters from a bright archway on the right and falls into step ahead. The architecture remains consistent with sandstone walls and decorative ceilings, while the camera maintains a steady following position behind the main character as the corridor stretches into the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit temple corridor as a character pursues a distant figure through a bustling ancient environment. It begins by trailing a figure in white linen attire through a long stone hallway, where sunlight streams through arched openings to cast dramatic shadows across the sandy floor and weathered red walls. As the character moves forward beneath a decorative ceiling, the space becomes more active with the presence of other pedestrians. The scene then expands as an NPC carrying a basket emerges from a bright archway on the right and falls into step ahead, while the camera maintains its steady following position. The movement concludes as the sandstone corridor continues to stretch into the distance, blending the solitude of the pursuit with the lived-in atmosphere of the temple.
